summary: Tested CRM and Dealer Portal UI improvements: Pagination (50/page) for Tickets and Customers, SLA breach filter, Customer CRUD operations, and Warranty rejection. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: Pagination implemented correctly with {tickets/customers, total, page, limit, total_pages} response structure
SLA breach filter works - filters tickets by sla_breached boolean field
Customer CRUD properly validates email/phone uniqueness and blocks deletion for customers with tickets/warranties/orders
Warranty rejection accepts both query param 'reason' and FormData 'notes' field
Search state preserved in sessionStorage for both Tickets and Customers pages
seed_data_creation: Test customers created with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM UI improvements fully working. Pagination shows 50 items per page. SLA Status filter has 'All', 'SLA Breached', and 'Within SLA' options. Customer CRUD includes Add/Edit/Delete with proper validation and deletion blocking.

features_tested.GET /api/admin/tickets pagination: PASS - Returns {tickets, total, page, limit, total_pages}
features_tested.GET /api/admin/tickets?sla_breached=true: PASS - Filters to only SLA breached tickets (16 found)
features_tested.GET /api/admin/tickets?sla_breached=fals: PASS - Filters to within SLA tickets
features_tested.GET /api/admin/customers pagination: PASS - Returns {customers, total, page, limit, total_pages}
features_tested.POST /api/admin/customers: PASS - Creates new customer with validation
features_tested.AdminTickets page SLA Status filter: PASS - Dropdown with SLA Breached option
features_tested.AdminCustomers page Add Customer button: PASS - Opens dialog with form fields
features_tested.AdminCustomers page Edit/Delete buttons: PASS - 50 edit and 50 delete buttons per page
